key_factors: Stock down 22.0% over 1y and 13.6% over 3m, with sharp gap down from $100.82 to $93.86 on 2024-03-22 post-Q3 FY24 earnings miss
P/E diluted compressed to 27.17x (low end of 26.8-37.5x 1y range) but P/B still elevated at 10.18x
Fundamentals showed recovery through Q2 FY24 (rev 13.39B, EPS 1.03 vs prior 12.82B/0.66) but Q3 FY24 print reversed momentum
News flow dominated by Lululemon comparisons and 'values or traps' framing (2024-03-28, 2024-03-29), signaling competitive pressure on the brand
ROE remains strong at 37.5% with 44% gross margin, providing some fundamental floor

sources_cited.excerpt: close=93.86 (post-Q3 FY24 earnings gap down from 100.82)
